search.title: Gur-e Amir
search.snippet: English: Gur-e Amir — Tomb of Timur—Tamerlane, in Samarkand, Uzbekistan.

search.title: Tamerlan
search.snippet: spellings of his name are: Temur, Taimur, Timur Lenk, Timur-i Leng, Temur-e Lang, Amir Timur, Aqsaq Timur, as well as the Latinized Tamerlane and Tamburlaine
